batch: Batch118 — Runtime Build Hard Gate & Future Blocker Prevention
purpose: Convert the Batch117 runtime/build blocker into a permanent release gate so future batches cannot claim hosted/demo/production readiness without raw build and smoke evidence.

hardBlockers.requiredEvidence: artifacts/raw-next-build-diagnostic-last-run.json with ok=true and rawNextBuildExitCode=0 from a current run
.next/BUILD_ID plus required Next server manifests from the same run
GIAOAN_SMOKE_MODE=production npm run live:smoke:clean must pass after a build artifact exists
GIAOAN_DEMO_URL=https://<hosted-url> npm run hosted:url-smoke must pass

permanentRules: No feature batch may mark runtime/build/hosted as closed from stale artifacts.
Guarded build artifacts can support local demo triage but cannot replace raw Next build exit 0.
If raw build is unresolved, next batch priority remains runtime/build closure instead of AI/payment/marketplace/community-public expansion.
Seed/scaffold/reviewed/verified labels must not be upgraded by UI copy or notes; only real review evidence may upgrade them.

nextConfigHardening.why: Batch117 observed a .next/export/500.html rename failure under over-constrained static generation settings. Batch118 removes those overrides and keeps build worker constraints only.
nextConfigHardening.traceScope: outputFileTracingRoot is locked to process.cwd() and obvious non-runtime folders are excluded to reduce trace work.
